form: Belair Direct Car Insurance Quote - 1 Car, 1 Driver (Quebec)

steps.title: Vehicle Information
steps.description: What would you do without your car? Let us protect it! Quote for residents of the province of Quebec.

questions.question: Year
questions.related_info: Select the year your vehicle was manufactured.

questions.question: Make
questions.related_info: Select the make (brand) of your vehicle.

questions.question: Model
questions.related_info: Select the model of your vehicle. You can also find your vehicle using the VIN (Vehicle Identification Number) for a quick and precise quote.

additional_options.label: Find your car with the VIN
additional_options.description: For a quick and precise quote

steps.title: Let's get more details
steps.description: This information will help us customize your coverage.

questions.question: Do you use your vehicle to commute to work or school?
questions.related_info: Indicates whether the vehicle is used for regular commuting purposes.

questions.question: Yearly kilometres
questions.related_info: Estimated total number of kilometres you expect to drive in a year. More kilometres may affect your premium.

questions.question: Condition of the car when you got it
questions.related_info: The condition of the vehicle at the time you acquired it affects the type of coverage available.

questions.question: Anti-theft system
questions.related_info: You could save more if your car has an anti-theft system. An anti-theft system helps deter theft and may reduce your premium.

steps.promotional_info: Insure more than one car and you could save 15%

steps.title: Driver Information
steps.description: Your age could unlock a discount! Start by entering the details of the registered owner of at least one of the vehicles you're insuring.

questions.question: First name
questions.related_info: As it appears on your driver's licence.
questions.validation: First name is required to continue.

questions.question: Last name
questions.related_info: As it appears on your driver's licence.

questions.question: Gender identity
questions.related_info: In order to provide an accurate quote, we need to know the gender identity of the individual being insured—as it appears under the Sex listed on their driver's licence. Gender X acknowledges all identities including but not limited to trans, non-binary, two-spirit, and binary people. We're committed to ensuring people of all genders and identities feel safe, welcome, and respected.

questions.question: Date of birth
questions.related_info: Your date of birth is used to calculate your age and determine applicable discounts and pricing.

questions.question: Age when you got your first driver's licence
questions.related_info: Can't remember how old you were when you got your first driver's licence? Don't worry! An approximate age will do.

steps.title: Your Quote & Next Steps
steps.description: Review your personalized quote and complete the sections below to finalize your coverage.
steps.pricing_disclaimer: The initial estimated prices displayed on this page are based on the summary information you provided, certain assumptions and preselected values (e.g. certain discounts for which you may be eligible) and are subject to change. When you complete your quote, we will provide a final price based on your unique situation and options for coverage and discounts, if applicable and subject to eligibility criteria. This initial estimated price is valid for 60 days.

sub_steps.title: Contact Details
sub_steps.description: A few contact details to save and send your quote.

questions.question: What is your email address?
questions.related_info: We will only use your email to save or send you a copy of your quote.

questions.question: What type of phone number are you providing?
questions.related_info: Select the type of phone number: Mobile, Home, or Work.

questions.question: What is your phone number?
questions.related_info: Enter your phone number in the format 555-000-0000.

questions.question: What is your postal code?
questions.related_info: Your postal code helps us calculate your rate accurately. Format: A1A 1A1.

questions.question: How many years have you lived at your current address?
questions.related_info: Select a range: Less than 1 year, 1-2 years, 3-5 years, 6-10 years, or More than 10 years.

sub_steps.title: Your coverage
sub_steps.description: Personalized coverage tailored to your driving profile.

coverage_items.name: Third party property damage protection
coverage_items.detail: Section A: Civil Liability. Covered up to $1,000,000.

coverage_items.name: Extra damage protection
coverage_items.detail: Coverage applies to perils other than Collision or Upset. Deductible: $250.

action.label: Customize
action.description: Adjust your coverage options and deductibles.

sub_steps.title: Confirm driver's information
sub_steps.description: Browse a few more questions to avoid any surprises.

questions.question: Have you had any at-fault accidents or traffic tickets in the past 6 years?
questions.related_info: Your driving history including accidents and tickets affects your insurance premium. Please confirm the accuracy of your driving record.

questions.question: Have you had a lapse in coverage?
questions.related_info: If you were not covered by a car insurance policy for six months or more, this is considered a lapse in coverage.

questions.question: Do you have a university degree?
questions.related_info: Unlock a discount if you have a bachelor's, master's or doctorate degree. Group membership may be verified.

sub_steps.title: Review your car usage and discounts
sub_steps.description: Don't forget to review your car usage and discounts.

questions.question: Do you use your vehicle for business purposes?
questions.related_info: Business use of your vehicle may affect your coverage and premium.

questions.question: Would you like to enroll in a safe driving program?
questions.related_info: A safe driving program tracks your driving habits and can unlock additional discounts based on good driving behaviour.

sub_steps.title: Car + Home discount
sub_steps.description: Bundle your car and home insurance to unlock additional savings.

questions.question: Would you like to add home insurance for an additional discount?
questions.related_info: Bundling your car and home insurance with belairdirect can give you a combined discount on both policies.

questions.question: Are you a member of an eligible employee group, alumni association, or other organization?
questions.related_info: Group membership (employer, school, or association) may qualify you for an additional discount. Group membership may be verified.

sub_steps.title: Review & Submit
sub_steps.description: Please review and agree to the following before getting your price.

questions.question: Do you agree to the Terms of Use and use of personal information?
questions.related_info: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use and use of personal information. I understand that the total estimated price provided is not a guaranteed amount.

questions.question: Do you give belairdirect permission to contact you about its products and services?
questions.related_info: I give belairdirect permission to contact me about its products and services by email, by phone or via other means. I am aware that I may withdraw my consent at any time.

questions.question: Do you consent to a soft credit check to help determine your best available rate?
questions.related_info: A soft credit check does not impact your credit score and could save you up to 25% on your car insurance. You can opt out at any time.

sub_steps.title: Next step
sub_steps.description: Your quote is ready. Continue to finalize your coverage and get insured.
